name: Claude Sandbox
description: Devcontainer Feature: Claude Code CLI, read-only GitHub access via $GH_TOKEN, destructive-tool-use hook, egress firewall, read-only pre-push, optional dotfiles clone. See https://github.com/fernandes-it/claude-sandbox.

firewallExtraDomains.description: Comma-separated list of extra domains to add to the egress allowlist. Example: 'proxy.golang.org,sum.golang.org'.

additionalTools.description: Comma-separated list of tools to install. Supported: goose, golangci-lint.

claudeVersion.description: Pin the Claude CLI version for reproducibility. 'latest' uses https://claude.ai/install.sh.

workspaceFolder.description: Workspace folder inside the container. Must match the consumer's devcontainer.json workspaceFolder and the Coder module's project_workspace_folder if overridden.

dotfilesUrl.description: HTTPS URL to a dotfiles repo. Cloned + 'install.sh' executed at postCreate time using $GH_TOKEN. Empty = skip.
